# Server Configuration
server.port=8080
server.servlet.context-path=/api

# Spring Boot Configuration
spring.application.name=system-information-service

# Database Configuration (MySQL)
spring.datasource.driver-class-name=com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
spring.datasource.url=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/system_info_db?useSSL=false&serverTimezone=UTC&characterEncoding=UTF-8
spring.datasource.username=${DB_USERNAME:admin}
spring.datasource.password=${DB_PASSWORD:}

# Connection Pool Settings
spring.datasource.hikari.connection-timeout=30000
spring.datasource.hikari.maximum-pool-size=10
spring.datasource.hikari.minimum-idle=5
spring.datasource.hikari.idle-timeout=600000

# JPA/Hibernate Configuration
spring.jpa.database-platform=org.hibernate.dialect.MySQL8Dialect
spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update
spring.jpa.show-sql=false
spring.jpa.properties.hibernate.format_sql=true
spring.jpa.properties.hibernate.jdbc.batch_size=20

# Logging Configuration
logging.level.root=INFO
logging.level.com.example=DEBUG
logging.pattern.console=%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} [%thread] %-5level %logger{36} - %msg%n

# Health Check Endpoint (Spring Boot Actuator)
management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=health,info
management.endpoint.health.show-details=when_authorized
